positive: A symmetrical, mystical composition featuring bioluminescent flora intertwined with celestial elements. Focus on giant, stylized lunar moths whose wings are mapped with nebulas and constellations. Incorporate intricate, fine-line mandalas and stylized zodiac glyphs orbiting the main subject. The overall aesthetic should be neo-art nouveau mixed with cosmic sci-fi, rendered with deep indigo, luminous teal, matte gold, and midnight black. The style must mimic a high-contrast woodcut or linocut print, emphasizing clean silhouettes and strong, deliberate negative space. Central composition, perfect for a t-shirt print. Cinematic lighting, highly detailed, ultra-sharp vector quality.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, low contrast, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, smudged, grain, photorealistic, 3d render, messy
